description_long: This object is a large, modern commercial airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of swept-back wings mounted low on the body. The wings each support two cylindrical engines, making a total of four engines, all positioned under the wings. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers. The nose is rounded and features a cockpit with visible windows, while the main body is smooth and unadorned, suggesting a metallic or composite exterior. The landing gear is not visible, implying it may be retracted or not modeled in detail.
description: A large, modern commercial airplane with four underwing engines, swept-back low wings, and a conventional tail. The fuselage is streamlined with a forward cockpit and smooth exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, cockpit windows, and the full span of the swept-back wings with four engines visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, and the conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, including the vertical and horizontal stabilizers, and the symmetry of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the same features from the other side of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turbofan engines, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; configuration not apparent.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
